name: Blue Ribbon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 24 ounces cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cracker crumbs, melted butter, and sugar in a bowl. Press the mixture evenly onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C).
3. In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
5. Blend in the melted butter and orange extract.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 15 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
8. Refrigerate the cheesecake for at least 12 hours before serving.
9. Carefully remove the sides of the springform pan.
10. Garnish with grated orange peel.
11. Serve chilled.
